name: pyredi

metadata.name: pyredi
metadata.summary: Python package for REDi - Resilient Design for the Next Generation of Buildings

documentation:
# PyREDi
 
## Official REDi™ Python Package

Please see visit the [REDi documentation](https://sgavrilovicarup.github.io/REDi-docs/) for the latest information.

Created at [Arup](https://www.arup.com) in San Francisco. 

### Install

```
pip install pyredi
```

### Usage

PyREDi [usage documentation](https://sgavrilovicarup.github.io/REDi-docs/#usage/).

**Note:** Tested for Python 3.11. May work with other versions as well. 

### Python version created and maintained by: 

Dr. Stevan Gavrilovic, Arup, Risk + Resilience Team, San Francisco

[Contact Us](mailto:stevan.gavrilovic@arup.com)

functions.name: REDi.test.conftest.pytest_configure
documentation:
Allows plugins and conftest files to perform initial configuration.
This hook is called for every plugin and initial conftest
file after command line options have been parsed.

functions.name: REDi.test.conftest.pytest_unconfigure
documentation: called before test process is exited.

functions.name: REDi.go_redi.get_consequence_by_component_by_floor
documentation: Sums consequences across all damage states for each component on each floor

functions.name: REDi.go_redi.get_repair_sequence_by_floor
documentation: Consequence_by_component_by_floor: nComponents x {NISTR: [ nRealization x [[total_cost, total_time] x nTotalFloor ]}

functions.name: REDi.utils.stat_utils.get_percentile
documentation:
Gets the percentile (from CDF) associated with a distribution and random variable x

Args:
distribution (str): type of distribution
var1 (float): first parameter of distribution
var2 (float): second parameter of distribution
x (float): random variable

Returns:
float: percentile (from CDF) associated with a distribution and random variable x

functions.name: REDi.test.fixtures.mock_responses.mock_wind_ASCE722_response
documentation: Note: input arg names have to match the function being mocked!
